zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Forth於1500年出生在英國素福爾可辛特萊善姆時，她的父親Sir Edward Forth20歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Mowbray26歲。她於1516年與Robert Vesey在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年在英國素福爾可享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Forth于1500年出生在英国素福爾可辛特萊善姆时，她的父亲Sir Edward Forth20岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Mowbray26岁。她于1516年与Robert Vesey在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年在英国素福爾可享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Forth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by a ford, Middle High German vort, vurt, Middle Low German vorde ‘ford, entrance way’, or a habitational name from a place in Franconia or in former Pomerania (now Poland) named Forth.

variants.name: Ford
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a ford (Middle English, Old English ford), or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word, such as Ford (Durham, Herefordshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Sussex), Ford in Sefton (Lancashire), Ford in Crediton and Ford in Holcombe Rogus (both Devon), Ford in Litton and Ford in Wiveliscombe (both Somerset).

Irish: Anglicized form (quasi-translation) of various Gaelic names, for example MacGiolla na Naomh ‘son of Gilla na Naomh’ (a personal name meaning ‘servant of the saints’), Mac Conshámha ‘son of Conshnámha’ (a personal name composed of the elements con ‘dog’ + snámh ‘to swim’), in all of which the final syllable was wrongly thought to be áth ‘ford’, and Ó Fuar(th)áin (see Foran ).

variants.name: Fortmann
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by a ford, Middle High German vort, vurt ‘ford’. See Forth .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Forth was born in 1500, in Hintlesham, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir Edward Forth, was 20 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Mowbray, was 26. She married Robert Vesey in 1516, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1560, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Forth est née en 1500, à Hintlesham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Forth, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Mowbray, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Vesey en 1516, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1560, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Forth 1500 in Hintlesham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edward Forth 20 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Mowbray 26. Sie hat 1516 in England Robert Vesey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1560 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Forth è nata il nel 1500 nel Hintlesham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir Edward Forth, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Mowbray, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Robert Vesey nel 1516, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1560, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Forthが1500年にイギリススフォルクヒントレシャムで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Forthは20歳，母Lady Elizabeth Mowbrayは26歳であった。1516年にイギリスでRobert Veseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年にイギリススフォルクで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Forth(이)가 1500년 영국 수폴크 인틀레샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Forth(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Mowbray(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1516년 영국에서 Robert Vesey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 영국 수폴크에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Forth nasceu em 1500, em Hintlesham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Forth, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Mowbray, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Vesey em 1516, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1560, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Forth родилась в 1500 г. в местности хинтлешам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Forth было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Mowbray, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Vesey в 1516 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1560 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Forth nació en 1500, en Hintlesham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Forth, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Mowbray, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Robert Vesey en 1516, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1560, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
